# Limitless HL Bot Maintainer Reference

> This reference maps the trading system back to commit `d5e965d3d5ff5f929d5bbe6cc34839d5fa8123db`. It is for maintainers auditing how markets are discovered, scored, executed, exited, and learned from.

## Limitless HL Bot

- [Limitless HL Bot Maintainer Reference](/limitless-hl-bot/overview.html): This reference maps the trading system back to commit `d5e965d3d5ff5f929d5bbe6cc34839d5fa8123db`. It is for maintainers auditing how markets are discovered, scored, executed, exited, and learned from.
- [Market Discovery and Venue Clients](/limitless-hl-bot/market-discovery.html): Discovery is read-only. It produces candidates and observations; order signing is delegated to the execution layer. Cached HTTP reads live in `cached_get_json`, which keeps network failures from silently becoming trading approval.
- [Scoring and Signals](/limitless-hl-bot/scoring-and-signals.html): Scores are evidence, not execution authority. The daemon applies strategy, price-band, cooldown, and learner gates before any candidate reaches an order builder.
- [Execution and Orders](/limitless-hl-bot/execution-and-orders.html): The order layer keeps construction separate from submission so tests can prove payload shape without broadcasting. Live routing raises `LiveTradingBlocked` when the configured boundary does not authorize a live path.
- [Risk, Quotes, and Exits](/limitless-hl-bot/risk-and-exits.html): Risk is layered: quote sizing, collateral accounting, live-performance gates, loss cooldowns, and an exit engine each have independent evidence and tests.
- [Operations and Learning](/limitless-hl-bot/operations-and-learning.html): PM2 process declarations live in `ecosystem.config.cjs`. The default posture keeps the funding-live process disabled until the learner has positive live evidence.
